title: Re:Zero Custom GUI Pack
description: This is a GUI-themed pack for the show "Re: Zero − Starting Life in Another World".
body: **![Preview](https://i.imgur.com/YwvMa4Z.jpeg)** ### **Introduction:** This is a **GUI-only resource pack**, so you can freely use it alongside other resource packs — just place it **on top** of the one you already use. This pack is themed after *“Re\:Zero − Starting Life in Another World”*, featuring a cool **icy blue, purple, and pink** palette. Unlike my other packs, this one also includes **scaled container textures**, which required extensive adjustments to ensure everything fits properly — I hope you enjoy the extra effort put into this design! I’ve also experimented with unique pictures for each container and customized the hot bar for a more immersive experience. If you’d prefer different color themes in the future — like **white & black** or anything else — feel free to let me know, and I’ll consider it for updates. If you find any bugs, please report them so I can fix them as soon as possible. --- Community Engagement: Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) to suggest future packs, participate in anime discussions, and enter monthly giveaways for Discord Nitro! [ ](https://listar-mc.net/) [ ] 🔗 Visit our relaunched website for more content, packs, and updates! ### **Images & Feature Highlights:** * **Settings** ![](https://i.imgur.com/1CY48WK.jpeg) * **HUD** ![](https://i.imgur.com/0eOy4U7.png) * **Creative Menu** ![](https://i.imgur.com/7o8epIN.png) * **Anvil** ![](https://i.imgur.com/Yu2ov28.png) * **Smoker** ![](https://i.imgur.com/tqIrTWy.png) * **Smithing Table** ![](https://i.imgur.com/O2tibaP.png) * **Brewing Stand** ![](https://i.imgur.com/IldX2Vf.png) * **Loom** ![](https://i.imgur.com/ye4CvDX.png) * **Shulker Box** ![](https://i.imgur.com/9IE2eHR.png) * **Enchantment Table** ![](https://i.imgur.com/468sdfP.png) * **Beacon Menu** ![](https://i.imgur.com/QLLvYU7.png) * **Furnace** ![](http://i.imgur.com/6ppCg47.png) * **Villager Trading Menu** ![](https://i.imgur.com/PYZtUKH.png) **Additional Resources:** - Explore more packs on [ListarMC](https://listar-mc.net/) - Join our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/RvScgzj3Ph) to suggest new packs, vote on upcoming designs, and participate in anime discussions. **Thank you for your support! ❤️**
